metadata.description: Generate 3D models from text prompts with Hunyuan 3D Pro

info.title: Queue OpenAPI for fal-ai/hunyuan-3d/v3.1/pro/text-to-3d
info.description: The OpenAPI schema for the fal-ai/hunyuan-3d/v3.1/pro/text-to-3d queue.

generate_type.description: Generation task type. Normal: textured model. Geometry: geometry-only white model (no textures). LowPoly/Sketch are not available in v3.1.
generate_type.title: Generate Type

enable_pbr.description: Enable PBR material generation (metallic, roughness, normal textures). Ignored when generate_type is Geometry.
enable_pbr.title: Enable Pbr

face_count.description: Target polygon face count. Range: 40,000-1,500,000. Default: 500,000.
face_count.title: Face Count

prompt.description: Text description of the 3D content to generate. Max 1024 UTF-8 characters.
examples: A super cool space ship with details
prompt.title: Prompt

thumbnail.description: Preview thumbnail of the generated model

mtl.description: MTL material file for OBJ model

file_size.title: File Size
file_size.description: The size of the file in bytes.

file_name.title: File Name
file_name.description: The name of the file. It will be auto-generated if not provided.

url.description: The URL where the file can be downloaded from.
url.title: Url

content_type.title: Content Type
content_type.description: The mime type of the file.

schema.description: Whether to include logs (`1`) in the response or not (`0`).

success.description: Whether the request was cancelled successfully.

metadata.description: Meshy-6 is the latest model from Meshy. It generates realistic and production ready 3D models.

info.title: Queue OpenAPI for fal-ai/meshy/v6/text-to-3d
info.description: The OpenAPI schema for the fal-ai/meshy/v6/text-to-3d queue.

x-fal-metadata.about:
Generate a 3D model from text using Meshy-6 Preview.

Supports two modes:
- preview: Returns untextured geometry only (20 credits)
- full: Returns fully textured model (30 credits + optional texture guidance)

Meshy-6 Preview features:
- Latest model with best quality
- Most accurate text understanding
- Superior geometry and texture quality
- Best for high-quality creative results

enable_rigging.title: Enable Rigging
enable_rigging.description: Automatically rig the generated model as a humanoid character. Includes basic walking and running animations. Best results with humanoid characters that have clearly defined limbs.

enable_pbr.title: Enable Pbr
enable_pbr.description: Generate PBR Maps (metallic, roughness, normal) in addition to base color.

pose_mode.title: Pose Mode
pose_mode.description: Pose mode for the generated model. 'a-pose' generates an A-pose, 't-pose' generates a T-pose, empty string for no specific pose.

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: Describe what kind of object the 3D model is. Maximum 600 characters.
examples: A rustic, antique wooden treasure chest with a curved, domed lid, constructed from weathered, dark brown planks exhibiting prominent wood grain and subtle distress. It's heavily reinforced with broad, dark grey, oxidized metal bands secured by numerous circular rivets. Ornate, dark iron decorative elements featuring swirling foliate patterns and dragon motifs adorn the corners and lid. A prominent, circular, intricately carved metal lock plate with a central keyhole dominates the front, flanked by two large, dark metallic pull rings.

is_a_t_pose.title: Is A T Pose
is_a_t_pose.description: Deprecated: use pose_mode instead. When true, generates a T-pose model.

should_remesh.title: Should Remesh
should_remesh.description: Whether to enable the remesh phase. When false, returns unprocessed triangular mesh.

enable_prompt_expansion.title: Enable Prompt Expansion
enable_prompt_expansion.description: Whether to enable prompt expansion. This will use a large language model to expand the prompt with additional details while maintaining the original meaning.

animation_action_id.title: Animation Action Id
animation_action_id.description: Animation preset ID from Meshy's library. Only used when enable_animation is true; in that case it must be in [0, 696] (``0`` is the "Idle" preset) and is otherwise rejected with a 422. See https://docs.meshy.ai/en/api/animation-library for available action IDs.

symmetry_mode.title: Symmetry Mode
symmetry_mode.description: Controls symmetry behavior during model generation.

topology.title: Topology
topology.description: Specify the topology of the generated model. Quad for smooth surfaces, Triangle for detailed geometry.

enable_safety_checker.title: Enable Safety Checker
enable_safety_checker.description: If set to true, input data will be checked for safety before processing.

enable_animation.title: Enable Animation
enable_animation.description: Apply an animation preset to the rigged model. Requires enable_rigging to be true.

texture_prompt.title: Texture Prompt
texture_prompt.description: Additional text prompt to guide the texturing process (only used in 'full' mode)

target_polycount.title: Target Polycount
target_polycount.description: Target number of polygons in the generated model

rigging_height_meters.title: Rigging Height Meters
rigging_height_meters.description: Approximate height of the character in meters. Only used when enable_rigging is true.

texture_image_url.title: Texture Image Url
texture_image_url.description: 2D image to guide the texturing process (only used in 'full' mode)

seed.title: Seed
seed.description: Seed for reproducible results. Same prompt and seed usually generate the same result.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Generation mode. 'preview' returns untextured geometry only, 'full' returns textured model (preview + refine).

actual_prompt.title: Actual Prompt
actual_prompt.description: The actual prompt used if prompt expansion was enabled

animation_fbx.description: Animated 3D model in FBX format. Only present when enable_animation is true.

thumbnail.description: Preview thumbnail of the generated model

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: The text prompt used for generation
examples: A rustic, antique wooden treasure chest with a curved, domed lid, constructed from weathered, dark brown planks exhibiting prominent wood grain and subtle distress. It's heavily reinforced with broad, dark grey, oxidized metal bands secured by numerous circular rivets. Ornate, dark iron decorative elements featuring swirling foliate patterns and dragon motifs adorn the corners and lid. A prominent, circular, intricately carved metal lock plate with a central keyhole dominates the front, flanked by two large, dark metallic pull rings.

rigged_character_fbx.description: Rigged character in FBX format. Only present when enable_rigging is true.

animation_glb.description: Animated 3D model in GLB format. Only present when enable_animation is true.

rigged_character_glb.description: Rigged character in GLB format. Only present when enable_rigging is true.

basic_animations.description: Basic walking and running animations. Only present when enable_rigging is true.

rig_task_id.title: Rig Task Id
rig_task_id.description: Rigging task ID. Only present when enable_rigging is true.

TextureFiles.title: TextureFiles
TextureFiles.description: Texture files downloaded and uploaded to CDN

file_name.title: File Name
file_name.description: The name of the file. It will be auto-generated if not provided.

content_type.title: Content Type
content_type.description: The mime type of the file.

file_size.title: File Size
file_size.description: The size of the file in bytes.

url.title: Url
url.description: The URL where the file can be downloaded from.

BasicAnimations.title: BasicAnimations
BasicAnimations.description: Basic animation files included with the rigging result

walking_armature_glb.description: Walking armature only in GLB format

running_armature_glb.description: Running armature only in GLB format

schema.description: Whether to include logs (`1`) in the response or not (`0`).

success.description: Whether the request was cancelled successfully.

metadata.description: Turn simple sketches into detailed, fully-textured 3D models. Instantly convert your concept designs into formats ready for Unity, Unreal, and Blender.

thumbnail.description: Preview thumbnail of the generated model

Someone waves hello with their right hand.
A dancer performs a spinning pirouette.

output_format.description: Output format: 'fbx' for animation files, 'dict' for raw JSON.

guidance_scale.description: Classifier-free guidance scale. Higher = more faithful to prompt.

metadata.description: Generate 3D models from text descriptions using Tripo H3.1.

info.title: Queue OpenAPI for tripo3d/h3.1/text-to-3d
info.description: The OpenAPI schema for the tripo3d/h3.1/text-to-3d queue.

H31TextTo3dInput.title: FullTextTo3DInput

texture_quality.title: Texture Quality
texture_quality.description: Quality level for textures. 'detailed' produces higher-resolution textures.

texture.title: Texture
texture.description: Whether to generate textures for the model.

auto_size.title: Auto Size
auto_size.description: Auto-scale the model to real-world dimensions (meters).

quad.title: Quad
quad.description: Generate quad (4-sided) mesh topology instead of triangles. When Tripo emits FBX bytes for quad output, the returned model file is FBX.

pbr.title: Pbr
pbr.description: Whether to generate PBR (Physically Based Rendering) materials. If true, texture is also enabled.

face_limit.title: Face Limit
face_limit.description: Target number of faces for the generated mesh. If not set, the model adaptively determines the count.

prompt.description: Text description of the 3D object to generate. Maximum 1024 characters.
prompt.title: Prompt
examples: A small house with a red roof and white walls

negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt
negative_prompt.description: Text describing features to avoid in the generated model.

H31TextTo3dInput.description: Input for Text to 3D generation using full-featured models (H3.1, v2.5).

model_mesh.description: Generated 3D model file. May be GLB or FBX depending on Tripo output.

rendered_image.description: Preview render of the generated 3D model.

content_type.description: The mime type of the file.
content_type.title: Content Type

url.title: Url
url.description: The URL where the file can be downloaded from.

file_size.description: The size of the file in bytes.
file_size.title: File Size

file_name.description: The name of the file. It will be auto-generated if not provided.
file_name.title: File Name

schema.description: Whether to include logs (`1`) in the response or not (`0`).

success.description: Whether the request was cancelled successfully.

metadata.description: Rodin V2.5 by Hyper3D generates realistic and production ready 3D models from text or images.

info.title: Queue OpenAPI for fal-ai/hyper3d/rodin/v2.5/text-to-3d
info.description: The OpenAPI schema for the fal-ai/hyper3d/rodin/v2.5/text-to-3d queue.

TAPose.description: Generate characters in T-pose or A-pose format, making them easier to rig and animate in 3D software.
TAPose.title: T/A Pose

bbox_condition.description: This is a controlnet that controls the maximum sized of the generated model.

hd_texture.description: Enables enhanced texture post-processing for higher visual fidelity.
hd_texture.title: Hd Texture

texture_delight.description: Removes baked lighting/highlights from the generated textures.
texture_delight.title: Texture Delight

seed.description: Seed value for randomization, ranging from 0 to 65535. Optional.
seed.title: Seed

prompt.description: A textual prompt to guide model generation. Required for Text-to-3D mode.
prompt.title: Prompt
examples: A futuristic robot with sleek metallic design.

is_micro.description: Generate finer micro-scale geometric detail. Only effective with `tier="Gen-2.5-Extreme-High"`.
is_micro.title: Is Micro

enable_creative_mode.description: If enabled, the generation will have enhanced generative robustness while ensuring output consistency. This corresponds to `geometry_instruct_mode` being equal to `creative` on the Hyper3D API.
enable_creative_mode.title: Enable Creative Mode

material.description: Material type. PBR: physically-based materials with realistic lighting. Shaded: baked lighting with no PBR maps. All: both PBR and Shaded variants. None: geometry only with no textures.
material.title: Material

texture_mode.description: Texture generation quality. When unset, the API picks a default appropriate for the tier.
texture_mode.title: Texture Mode

quality_mesh_option.description: Combined quality and mesh type selection. Quad = smooth surfaces, Triangle = detailed geometry. Maps to `mesh_mode` (Quad/Raw) and `quality_override` (face count) on the Hyper3D API. Valid face counts depend on the selected tier. Up to 1M Triangle is supported for tiers Extreme-Low, Low, and Medium. Up to 2M Triangle (as low as 20K Triangle) is supported for tiers High and Extreme-High.
quality_mesh_option.title: Quality Mesh Option

tier.description: Generation tier. Higher tiers produce more detailed meshes but cost more. Extreme-High enables the highest-detail mode and bills at double the base rate. See more info in the [documentation](https://developer.hyper3d.ai/api-specification/rodin-gen2.5#use-gen-2.5-generation-with-following-gen-2.5-tiers).
tier.title: Tier

geometry_file_format.description: Format of the geometry file. Possible values: glb, usdz, fbx, obj, stl. Default is glb.
geometry_file_format.title: Geometry File Format

model_meshes.description: Additional generated 3D object files returned by Hyper3D besides model_mesh.
model_meshes.title: Model Meshes

length.description: Length (z axis) dimension for the bounding box constraint.
length.title: Length

height.description: Height (y axis) dimension for the bounding box constraint.
height.title: Height

width.description: Width (x axis) dimension for the bounding box constraint.
width.title: Width

high_pack.description: Selecting HighPack generates 4K resolution texture instead of the default 2K. In Quad mode, the number of faces becomes ~16× the count set in the quality parameter.
high_pack.title: High Pack

file_name.description: The name of the file. It will be auto-generated if not provided.
file_name.title: File Name

file_size.description: The size of the file in bytes.
file_size.title: File Size

url.description: The URL where the file can be downloaded from.
url.title: Url

content_type.description: The mime type of the file.
content_type.title: Content Type

file_name.description: The name of the file. It will be auto-generated if not provided.
file_name.title: File Name

file_size.description: The size of the file in bytes.
file_size.title: File Size

url.description: The URL where the file can be downloaded from.
url.title: Url

content_type.description: The mime type of the file.
content_type.title: Content Type

height.description: The height of the image in pixels.
height.title: Height

width.description: The width of the image in pixels.
width.title: Width

schema.description: Whether to include logs (`1`) in the response or not (`0`).

success.description: Whether the request was cancelled successfully.

P1TextTo3dInput.description:
Input for Text to 3D generation using the P1 model.

P1 is optimized for clean low-poly mesh generation in ~2 seconds.
It supports a restricted parameter set compared to H3.1/v2.5.
